zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Warde於1459年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾格亞特 吉文代爾時，她的父親Sir Roger Warde II27歲，母親Joan Tunstall29歲。她於1474年與Sir John Norton在英國越可爾沃斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1520年9月3日在英國英格蘭越可爾沃斯享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾托德莫登聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Warde于1459年出生在英国英格兰越可爾格亞特 吉文代爾时，她的父亲Sir Roger Warde II27岁，母亲Joan Tunstall29岁。她于1474年与Sir John Norton在英国越可爾沃斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1520年9月3日在英国英格兰越可爾沃斯享年61岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾托德莫登聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Warde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Cormac, Donal.

variants.name: Ward
meanings: English: occupational name for a watchman or guard, from Middle English ward ‘watchman, guard’ (Old English weard, used as both an agent noun and an abstract noun).
English: occupational name from Middle English warde ‘armed guard’ (Old English weard ‘watching, guarding’), with the same meaning as 1 above.

Irish: shortened form of McWard, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Bhaird ‘son of the poet’. The surname occurs throughout Ireland, where three different branches of the family are known as professional poets.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Warde was born in 1459, in Great Givendale, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Roger Warde II, was 27 and her mother, Joan Tunstall, was 29. She married Sir John Norton in 1474, in Wath, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 3 September 1520, in Wath, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61, and was buried in St Mary's Church, Todmorden, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Warde est née en 1459, à Great Givendale, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Roger Warde II, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Joan Tunstall, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Norton en 1474, à Wath, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 septembre 1520, à Wath, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à St Mary's Church, Todmorden, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat 1474 in Wath, Yorkshire, England Sir John Norton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. September 1520 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Wath, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Mary's Church, Todmorden, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Warde è nata il nel 1459 nel Great Givendale, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Roger Warde II, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Joan Tunstall, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Norton nel 1474, nel Wath, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 3 settembre 1520, nel Wath, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a St Mary's Church, Todmorden, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Wardeが1459年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアグレアト ギベンダルで生まれた時，父Sir Roger Warde IIは27歳，母Joan Tunstallは29歳であった。1474年にイギリスヨークシュアイアワスでSir John Nortonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1520年9月3日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアワスで61歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアトドモーデンスト マリ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Of Sharpenhoe,Bedfordshire,England: 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 스트리틀리 위스 샤르펜호 샤르펜호
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Warde(이)가 1459년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 그리트 지븐데일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Roger Warde II(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Tunstall(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1474년 영국 요르크실르 왓h에서 Sir John Norton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1520년 9월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 왓h에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 토드모르든 스트 마이'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Warde nasceu em 1459, em Great Givendale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Roger Warde II, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Joan Tunstall, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Norton em 1474, em Wath, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de setembro de 1520, em Wath, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em St Mary's Church, Todmorden, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Warde родилась в 1459 г. в местности грит гивендеил, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Roger Warde II было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Tunstall, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Norton в 1474 г. в местности ват, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 3 сентября 1520 г. в местности ват, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности ст мэри'с чурч, тодморден, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Warde nació en 1459, en Great Givendale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Roger Warde II, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Joan Tunstall, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Sir John Norton en 1474, en Wath, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 3 de septiembre de 1520, en Wath, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en St Mary's Church, Todmorden, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
